text.title: Risk Register Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping register state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Does every active row have all 12 mandatory columns filled with non-empty values?

conclusion.verdict: reject register; force missing columns to be filled

branch.question: Does every scored row carry an evidence citation?

conclusion.verdict: reject scores; require source citation per P and I

branch.question: Are all status values in the bounded enum?
Was any row deleted across versions?

conclusion.verdict: restore deleted rows; convert to closed status

text.example: missing_columns=false, evidence_present=true, status_in_enum=true, deletion_detected=false → accept register.
